subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath strengthened His loved ones to serve His chosen ones and through His grace hath guided them to steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اید احبائه علی خدمه اصفیائه و وفقهم بفضله علی الاستقامه علی
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @chastisement and requital, @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
